extra_commands: echo '===== OUT LOG grep (auth/reset/error) =====' && tail -n 800 ~/.pm2/logs/qrbanner-out.log 2>&1 | grep -iE 'error|reset-password|change-password|invalid_credentials|Reset password|Change password|Unhandled|TypeError|Prisma' | tail -60

echo '===== PM2 STATUS =====' && pm2 jlist 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(p['name'], 'restarts=', p['pm2_env'].get('restart_time'), 'status=', p['pm2_env'].get('status')) for p in d]" 2>&1 | tail -10
